description: Add five new SDK utilities to plugin-sdk that eliminate the most common boilerplate across all 27 plugins: auth cache persistence, fetchText for non-JSON responses, getMetaContent for meta tag reading, buildQueryString for URL parameter construction, and findLocalStorageEntry for key pattern searching. Update the barrel exports and internal CLAUDE.md docs.

userStories.title: Add getAuthCache / setAuthCache / clearAuthCache to storage.ts
userStories.description: Add three functions to platform/plugin-sdk/src/storage.ts that provide typed read/write/clear access to globalThis.__openTabs.tokenCache[namespace]. This eliminates ~20 lines of identical boilerplate from 15+ plugins that all manually persist auth tokens to survive adapter re-injection.
acceptanceCriteria: getAuthCache<T>(namespace: string): T | null reads globalThis.__openTabs.tokenCache[namespace], returns null on missing or error
setAuthCache<T>(namespace: string, value: T): void writes to globalThis.__openTabs.tokenCache[namespace], initializing __openTabs and tokenCache objects if absent
clearAuthCache(namespace: string): void sets globalThis.__openTabs.tokenCache[namespace] to undefined
All three functions wrap access in try-catch and silently handle errors (consistent with existing storage.ts pattern)
All three functions are exported from storage.ts and re-exported from index.ts
The generic T allows both primitive strings (Discord token) and complex objects (Jira auth with accountId + cloudId)

userStories.title: Add fetchText to fetch.ts
userStories.description: Add a fetchText function to platform/plugin-sdk/src/fetch.ts that fetches a URL and returns the response body as a string (not JSON). This is needed by GitHub (diffs), GitLab (job logs), and Bitbucket (diffs) which all implement their own apiRaw() variants.
acceptanceCriteria: fetchText(url, init?) returns Promise<string> using fetchFromPage under the hood
Returns response.text() on success
Handles 204/empty content-length by returning empty string
Inherits all fetchFromPage behavior (credentials, timeout, error classification)
Exported from fetch.ts and re-exported from index.ts

userStories.title: Add getMetaContent to dom.ts
userStories.description: Add a getMetaContent function to platform/plugin-sdk/src/dom.ts that reads the content attribute of a <meta> tag by name. Used by GitHub, Jira, Confluence, and GitLab for auth detection.
acceptanceCriteria: getMetaContent(name: string): string | null queries document.querySelector('meta[name="..."]') and returns the content attribute
Returns null if the meta tag is not found or has no content attribute
Handles invalid/empty name parameter gracefully (returns null)
Exported from dom.ts and re-exported from index.ts

userStories.title: Add buildQueryString to fetch.ts
userStories.description: Add a buildQueryString utility to platform/plugin-sdk/src/fetch.ts that converts a record of key-value pairs into a URL query string, filtering out undefined values. Used by ~20 plugins that all manually build URLSearchParams.
acceptanceCriteria: buildQueryString accepts Record<string, string | number | boolean | string[] | undefined>
Filters out undefined values before building the query string
Converts number and boolean values to strings via String()
Handles string[] values by appending multiple entries for the same key
Returns empty string (not '?') when all values are undefined or the record is empty
Returns the query string WITHOUT the leading '?' character
Exported from fetch.ts and re-exported from index.ts

userStories.title: Add findLocalStorageEntry to storage.ts
userStories.description: Add a findLocalStorageEntry function to platform/plugin-sdk/src/storage.ts that searches localStorage keys using a predicate function. Needed by Teams (MSAL token discovery) and ClickHouse (Auth0 token discovery) which iterate localStorage to find tokens by key prefix.
acceptanceCriteria: findLocalStorageEntry(predicate: (key: string) => boolean): { key: string; value: string } | null
Iterates localStorage keys and returns the first entry where the predicate returns true
Returns null if no matching key is found or if localStorage is inaccessible
Uses the same iframe fallback as getLocalStorage for environments where localStorage is deleted
Exported from storage.ts and re-exported from index.ts

userStories.title: Update plugin-sdk CLAUDE.md with new and missing utilities
userStories.description: Update platform/plugin-sdk/CLAUDE.md to document all five new SDK utilities and the existing utilities that were previously missing from the internal docs (putJSON, patchJSON, deleteJSON, postForm, postFormData, httpStatusToToolError, parseRetryAfterMs, setSessionStorage, removeLocalStorage, removeSessionStorage).
acceptanceCriteria: CLAUDE.md Fetch section lists all fetch utilities: fetchFromPage, fetchJSON, postJSON, putJSON, patchJSON, deleteJSON, fetchText, postForm, postFormData, httpStatusToToolError, parseRetryAfterMs, buildQueryString

CLAUDE.md Storage section lists: getLocalStorage, setLocalStorage, getSessionStorage, setSessionStorage, removeLocalStorage, removeSessionStorage, getCookie, getAuthCache, setAuthCache, clearAuthCache, findLocalStorageEntry
CLAUDE.md DOM section lists: waitForSelector, waitForSelectorRemoval, querySelectorAll, getTextContent, getMetaContent, observeDOM
Each new utility has a one-line signature description consistent with the existing format
userStories.notes:
Files:
- platform/plugin-sdk/CLAUDE.md (update the SDK Utilities section)

Context:
The current CLAUDE.md is stale — it only lists 3 fetch utilities (fetchFromPage, fetchJSON, postJSON) but the SDK actually exports 12. Similarly, the storage section omits setSessionStorage, removeLocalStorage, removeSessionStorage. After the new utilities from US-001 through US-005 land, the CLAUDE.md needs to list everything.

Changes:
Update the Fetch Utilities section to include all functions:
- `fetchFromPage(url, init?)` → `Promise<Response>` — existing
- `fetchJSON<T>(url, init?, schema?)` → `Promise<T>` — existing
- `fetchText(url, init?)` → `Promise<string>` — NEW, returns response as text instead of JSON
- `postJSON<T>(url, body, init?, schema?)` → `Promise<T>` — existing
- `putJSON<T>(url, body, init?, schema?)` → `Promise<T>` — existing but missing from docs
- `patchJSON<T>(url, body, init?, schema?)` → `Promise<T>` — existing but missing from docs
- `deleteJSON<T>(url, init?, schema?)` → `Promise<T>` — existing but missing from docs
- `postForm<T>(url, body, init?, schema?)` → `Promise<T>` — existing but missing from docs
- `postFormData<T>(url, body: FormData, init?, schema?)` → `Promise<T>` — existing but missing from docs
- `httpStatusToToolError(response, message)` → `ToolError` — existing but missing from docs
- `parseRetryAfterMs(value)` → `number | undefined` — existing but missing from docs
- `buildQueryString(params)` → `string` — NEW

Update the Storage Utilities section to include all functions:
- `getLocalStorage(key)` → `string | null` — existing
- `setLocalStorage(key, value)` → `void` — existing
- `getSessionStorage(key)` → `string | null` — existing
- `setSessionStorage(key, value)` → `void` — existing but missing from docs
- `removeLocalStorage(key)` → `void` — existing but missing from docs
- `removeSessionStorage(key)` → `void` — existing but missing from docs
- `getCookie(name)` → `string | null` — existing
- `getAuthCache<T>(namespace)` → `T | null` — NEW
- `setAuthCache<T>(namespace, value)` → `void` — NEW
- `clearAuthCache(namespace)` → `void` — NEW
- `findLocalStorageEntry(predicate)` → `{ key, value } | null` — NEW

Update the DOM Utilities section to add:
- `getMetaContent(name)` → `string | null` — NEW

Constraints:
- Follow the existing one-line-per-function documentation style
- Do NOT change any other sections of the CLAUDE.md
- Keep descriptions concise — the public docs site has the full API reference
